title: Nitakka
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Nitakka''' was the [[Yevethan (language)|Yevethan]] term for a male [[Yevetha]]n. It could be both singular (one nitakka) or plural (two nitakka). A Yevethan war cry was "Thetan nitakka, ko nakaza", which translated roughly as "to the strongest of us, glory in the kill".

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
